raw_consumer_statement:
Returned an item, person who ran the return ran it as store credit without warning even though a receipt was present. The reason why it ran as store credit without warning is because I didnt give them a receipt. When I asked to run it as a charge back instead they refused to and said, " they couldn't do anything now. '' Tried contacting the manager and got no where. And to make matters even worse, the store credit didnt even work. 

When I disputed the charge in less then XXXX hours I got a email saying, " XXXX you take it up with the mamanger. '' Customer support doent help, citi saids, " we did what we needed to do, '' which Im guessing means immediatly close the dispute. 

Don't use cards with citi bank. 

Case number is : XXXX
